purpose: Sepolia rehearsal of MasterTreasury.registerVault — proves the call-stack the mainnet ceremony will use later. Sepolia governance is an EOA (no Safe), so execution is one cast send by the operator, not a Safe propose flow.
authority_path: EOA cast send (Sepolia governance is the rehearsal EOA 0xEBDDDf598b5b53C91ff185501d7b182ae5d6B88A; mainnet governance is the Warm Safe and uses the propose+cosign flow at MAINNET_VAULT_REGISTRATION_PREP.json instead).
notes: This is auditable evidence of intent. Anyone with Foundry can verify the calldata matches by running: cast calldata 'registerVault(uint256,address)' 84532 0x474Df6994918B5c01Aab413Cf3718DFd1bb0F7Bc

After the operator runs operator_command, append the exec tx hash + block to docs/STATE_OF_XION_PREFLIGHT.md and update genesis/TREASURY_VAULTS.json to record the on-chain registration alongside the existing vaults[] entry.
Mainnet equivalent: genesis/MAINNET_VAULT_REGISTRATION_PREP.json (Warm Safe propose+cosign flow rather than EOA cast send).
